================================================================================
RAG EVALUATION ANALYSIS REPORT
================================================================================

Total Configurations Tested: 12
Total Test Cases per Config: 100

Embedding Models:
  - minilm: all-MiniLM-L6-v2
  - bge: BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5
  - multiqa: sentence-transformers/multi-qa-mpnet-base-dot-v1

Generation Models:
  - mistral_v01: mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1
  - mistral_v02: mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2
  - phi2: microsoft/phi-2
  - qwen: Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct

================================================================================
OUTPUTS GENERATED
================================================================================
1. summary_statistics.csv - Full statistics for all configurations
2. summary_readable.csv - Human-readable summary table
3. best_configurations.csv - Best config for each metric
4. embedding_comparison.csv - Embedding model performance
5. generation_comparison.csv - Generation model performance
6. Heatmaps for key metrics (PNG files)
7. Bar charts for model comparisons (PNG files)
